summary: afterCommit hooks fire before COMMIT in PgAdapter — hooks execute in txFn finally block before client.transaction() issues COMMIT
details: In makePgAdapter's transaction() at adapter.ts:222-233, fireHooks() runs in the `finally` block inside the transaction callback (txFn). This is BEFORE client.transaction() issues the actual COMMIT. Consequence: (1) hooks fire even if fn(tx) throws after registering hooks, (2) hooks fire even if COMMIT subsequently fails. This is a pre-existing design defect in the adapter, not introduced by PG-003. Recommend repairing fireHooks() ordering as a follow-up slice.
